description_long: This object depicts an adult pedestrian with a stylized, somewhat distorted form, featuring exaggerated and elongated limbs and body. The head is clearly visible, with facial features and short hair, and the figure appears to be wearing glasses. The clothing consists of a long, flowing outer garment that drapes dramatically, with a more fitted upper section and a visible collar. The arms are partially extended, and the hands are not clearly defined, blending into the garment. The overall form is abstracted, with sharp angles and stretched surfaces, giving the figure a dynamic, windswept appearance. The color palette is dominated by shades of yellow and dark blue, with some red accents on the upper torso.
description: A stylized adult pedestrian with a long, flowing garment, glasses, and abstracted, elongated features in yellow and blue tones.
description_view_0: The head and upper torso are visible, with glasses and facial features; the garment flows outward dramatically.
description_view_1: The side of the head and the extended, angular garment are prominent, with less detail on the face.
description_view_2: The back of the head and the trailing garment are visible, with the figure's form mostly obscured by the flowing material.
description_view_3: A clear view of the head in profile, with the garment extending behind and to the side, emphasizing the figure's elongated silhouette.
attribute_clothing_type: long flowing coat with fitted upper section and collar
